title: juncoides carolinae
intro: Juncoides carolinae, also known as Carolina sea lavender or beach sunflower, is a plant species native to the southeastern United States, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and shrub-like growth. The medicinal properties of Juncoides carolinae include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and a diuretic, making it useful in treating conditions such as arthritis and high blood pressure. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and promoting relaxation, which may contribute to its traditional use in treating anxiety and insomnia. Herbal preparations of Juncoides carolinae can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
